description.overview: One of the smallest breeds in the world, Russian Toys are lively, devoted companions. They come in smooth and long-haired varieties.
description.history: The Russian Toy originated in Russia.
description.temperament: Known for being active, cheerful, devoted.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their smooth or long-haired coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: One of the smallest breeds in the world, Russian Toys are lively, devoted companions. They come in smooth and long-haired varieties.
